---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<div id="site-header">
<img src="LOGO-lockup.png" alt="Dog Capital" style="height: 36px; width: auto; display: block; margin: 0;">
<p>Systematic strategies for Argentine investors.</p>
<p>Rules-based, evidence-driven, transparently tracked.</p>
</div>

<div id="site-nav">
<a href="index.qmd#programs">Active Strategies</a>
<a href="about.qmd">About Us</a>
<a href="research/index.qmd">Research Center</a>
<a href="enquiries.qmd">Enquiries</a>
</div>

<div id="programs" style="padding: 4rem 0 2rem 0;">

### Active Strategies

<div class="program-card">
<span class="tag">Demo Trading</span>
<span class="tag">Interactive Brokers</span>

### ES Core

The core research strategy — U.S. large-cap equity futures with a dynamic tactical sleeve.

<div class="card-stats">
<div><div class="stat-label">CAGR</div><div class="stat-value">11.34%</div></div>
<div><div class="stat-label">Sharpe</div><div class="stat-value">0.563</div></div>
<div><div class="stat-label">Max DD</div><div class="stat-value">-49.29%</div></div>
</div>

*Backtest, 2003–2026 — not a live track record.*

[View research →](programs/es-core.qmd)

</div>

<div class="program-card">
<span class="tag live">Live Trading</span>
<span class="tag">Balanz</span>

### SPY Core

U.S. and global ETFs as a permanent equity core, executed as CEDEARs on the Argentine market.

<div class="card-stats">
<div><div class="stat-label">CAGR</div><div class="stat-value">11.68%</div></div>
<div><div class="stat-label">Sharpe</div><div class="stat-value">0.810</div></div>
<div><div class="stat-label">Max DD</div><div class="stat-value">-34.57%</div></div>
</div>

*Backtest, 2001–2026 — live execution track record not yet published.*

[View research →](programs/etf-core.qmd)

</div>

</div>

<div id="site-footer">
&copy; 2026 Dog Capital &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Buenos Aires
</div>
